configEntries.description: Git branch passed to hermes update --branch. Leave as main for the standard channel.
Hermes source checkout used for git fallback checks when hermes update --check is unavailable.
Set to true to pass --backup during standard update operations.
Set to true to run hermes gateway status after update and doctor steps.

scripts.name: Check Hermes Agent Updates
scripts.description: Runs hermes update --check and emits a stable dashboard parser line when an update appears available.

steps.label: Check Hermes Agent updates
steps.command:
branch="{{config.branch}}"
install_path="{{config.installPath}}"
[ -n "$branch" ] || branch=main
case "$branch" in
  *[!A-Za-z0-9._/-]*)
    echo "Invalid Hermes branch: $branch" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
case "$install_path" in
  ~/*) install_path="$HOME/${install_path#~/}" ;;
esac
current="$(hermes version 2>/dev/null || hermes --version 2>/dev/null || printf unknown)"
current="$(printf '%s\n' "$current" | awk 'NF { print $NF; exit }' | sed 's/^[(]//; s/[)]$//')"
[ -n "$current" ] || current=unknown
ahead_count=""
if [ -d "$install_path/.git" ] && command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if git -C "$install_path" fetch origin "$branch" --quiet; then
    ahead_count="$(git -C "$install_path" rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$branch" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  fi
fi
output="$(hermes update --check --branch "$branch" 2>&1)"
status=$?
printf '%s\n' "$output"
output_count="$(printf '%s\n' "$output" | sed -nE 's/.*[^0-9]([0-9]+)[[:space:]]+commits?[[:space:]]+behind.*/\1/p; s/.*[^0-9]([0-9]+)[[:space:]]+commits?[[:space:]]+ahead.*/\1/p' | head -1)"
if [ "$status" -eq 0 ]; then
  if printf '%s\n' "$output" | grep -Eiq 'available|behind|newer|update.*(available|found)|would update|can update'; then
    next="$(printf '%s\n' "$output" | sed -nE 's/.*(v?[0-9]{4}\.[0-9]{1,2}\.[0-9]{1,2}[^[:space:]]*|v?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+){1,3}[^[:space:]]*).*/\1/p' | tail -1 | sed 's/^[(]//; s/[)]$//')"
    commit_count="$output_count"
    [ -n "$commit_count" ] || commit_count="$ahead_count"
    if [ -n "$commit_count" ] && [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
      if [ "$commit_count" = "1" ]; then
        next="1-commit-ahead"
      else
        next="${commit_count}-commits-ahead"
      fi
    fi
    [ -n "$next" ] || next=unknown
    printf 'LUDASH_UPDATE hermes-agent %s %s\n' "$current" "$next"
  fi
  exit 0
fi
echo "hermes update --check failed; falling back to git comparison when available."
if [ -d "$install_path/.git" ] && command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  local_sha="$(git -C "$install_path" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)"
  remote_sha="$(git -C "$install_path" rev-parse --short "origin/$branch" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$local_sha" ] && [ -n "$remote_sha" ] && [ "$local_sha" != "$remote_sha" ]; then
    next="$remote_sha"
    commit_count="$output_count"
    [ -n "$commit_count" ] || commit_count="$ahead_count"
    if [ -n "$commit_count" ] && [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
      if [ "$commit_count" = "1" ]; then
        next="1-commit-ahead"
      else
        next="${commit_count}-commits-ahead"
      fi
    fi
    printf 'LUDASH_UPDATE hermes-agent %s %s\n' "$local_sha" "$next"
  fi
  exit 0
fi
exit "$status"

scripts.name: Detect Hermes Agent
scripts.description: Checks whether the hermes CLI is available on the remote system.

scripts.name: Backup Update Hermes Agent
scripts.description: Runs hermes update --backup for high-value Hermes profiles, then validates the install.

steps.label: Backup update Hermes Agent
steps.command:
branch="{{config.branch}}"
[ -n "$branch" ] || branch=main
case "$branch" in
  *[!A-Za-z0-9._/-]*)
    echo "Invalid Hermes branch: $branch" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
set -- update --backup
if [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then
  set -- "$@" --branch "$branch"
fi
errexit_was_on=false
case "$-" in
  *e*) errexit_was_on=true; set +e ;;
esac
update_output="$(hermes "$@" 2>&1)"
update_status=$?
if [ "$errexit_was_on" = "true" ]; then
  set -e
fi
printf '%s\n' "$update_output"
if [ "$update_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  if printf '%s\n' "$update_output" | grep -Eiq 'Local changes were restored on top of the updated codebase|Updated Hermes Agent'; then
    echo "Hermes update returned exit code $update_status after a completed update; continuing validation."
  else
    exit "$update_status"
  fi
fi
doctor_status=0
hermes doctor 2>&1 || doctor_status=$?
if [ "$doctor_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Hermes doctor reported issues after update; update completed. Run the Hermes repair action for details." >&2
fi
version_status=0
hermes version 2>&1 || version_status=$?
if [ "{{config.includeGatewayStatus}}" = "true" ]; then
  hermes gateway status 2>&1 || true
fi
if [ "$version_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  exit "$version_status"
fi
exit 0

scripts.name: List Installed Hermes Agent
scripts.description: Reports the installed Hermes Agent version for package inventory.

steps.label: List installed Hermes Agent
steps.command:
version="$(hermes version 2>/dev/null || hermes --version 2>/dev/null || true)"
version="$(printf '%s\n' "$version" | awk 'NF { print $NF; exit }' | sed 's/^[(]//; s/[)]$//')"
[ -n "$version" ] || version=unknown
printf 'hermes-agent %s\n' "$version"

scripts.name: Run Hermes Doctor
scripts.description: Runs post-update validation with hermes doctor, hermes version, and optional gateway status.

steps.label: Run Hermes doctor
steps.command:
hermes doctor 2>&1
hermes version 2>&1
if [ "{{config.includeGatewayStatus}}" = "true" ]; then
  hermes gateway status 2>&1 || true
fi

parserConfig.issueRegex: needs repair|database is locked|database locked|permission denied|failed to fetch|failed to restore|working tree.*dirty|local changes.*could not|doctor.*failed|gateway.*(failed|unhealthy)
parserConfig.issueMessage: Run Hermes doctor, then refresh updates.

scripts.name: Update Hermes Agent
scripts.description: Runs hermes update using the configured branch and optional pre-update backup, then validates the install.

steps.label: Update Hermes Agent
steps.command:
branch="{{config.branch}}"
backup="{{config.backup}}"
[ -n "$branch" ] || branch=main
case "$branch" in
  *[!A-Za-z0-9._/-]*)
    echo "Invalid Hermes branch: $branch" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
set -- update
if [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then
  set -- "$@" --branch "$branch"
fi
case "$backup" in
  true|TRUE|yes|YES|1) set -- "$@" --backup ;;
esac
errexit_was_on=false
case "$-" in
  *e*) errexit_was_on=true; set +e ;;
esac
update_output="$(hermes "$@" 2>&1)"
update_status=$?
if [ "$errexit_was_on" = "true" ]; then
  set -e
fi
printf '%s\n' "$update_output"
if [ "$update_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  if printf '%s\n' "$update_output" | grep -Eiq 'Local changes were restored on top of the updated codebase|Updated Hermes Agent'; then
    echo "Hermes update returned exit code $update_status after a completed update; continuing validation."
  else
    exit "$update_status"
  fi
fi
doctor_status=0
hermes doctor 2>&1 || doctor_status=$?
if [ "$doctor_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Hermes doctor reported issues after update; update completed. Run the Hermes repair action for details." >&2
fi
version_status=0
hermes version 2>&1 || version_status=$?
if [ "{{config.includeGatewayStatus}}" = "true" ]; then
  hermes gateway status 2>&1 || true
fi
if [ "$version_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  exit "$version_status"
fi
exit 0

scripts.name: Update Selected Hermes Agent Package
scripts.description: Updates Hermes Agent when hermes-agent is selected from the update list.

steps.label: Update selected Hermes Agent package
steps.command:
case "{{package}}" in
  hermes-agent) ;;
  *)
    echo "Unsupported Hermes package selection: {{package}}" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
branch="{{config.branch}}"
backup="{{config.backup}}"
[ -n "$branch" ] || branch=main
case "$branch" in
  *[!A-Za-z0-9._/-]*)
    echo "Invalid Hermes branch: $branch" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
set -- update
if [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then
  set -- "$@" --branch "$branch"
fi
case "$backup" in
  true|TRUE|yes|YES|1) set -- "$@" --backup ;;
esac
errexit_was_on=false
case "$-" in
  *e*) errexit_was_on=true; set +e ;;
esac
update_output="$(hermes "$@" 2>&1)"
update_status=$?
if [ "$errexit_was_on" = "true" ]; then
  set -e
fi
printf '%s\n' "$update_output"
if [ "$update_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  if printf '%s\n' "$update_output" | grep -Eiq 'Local changes were restored on top of the updated codebase|Updated Hermes Agent'; then
    echo "Hermes update returned exit code $update_status after a completed update; continuing validation."
  else
    exit "$update_status"
  fi
fi
doctor_status=0
hermes doctor 2>&1 || doctor_status=$?
if [ "$doctor_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Hermes doctor reported issues after update; update completed. Run the Hermes repair action for details." >&2
fi
version_status=0
hermes version 2>&1 || version_status=$?
if [ "$version_status" -ne 0 ]; then
  exit "$version_status"
fi
exit 0
